classObjective: Evaluate numerical expressions accurately using the order of operations.
workedExamples: 1-1, Example 4 — Evaluate Numerical Expressions Using Order of Operations
1-1, Example 5 — Evaluate Numerical Expressions (Powers and Nested Grouping)
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: applying order of operations to nested grouping symbols and fraction bars
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice evaluating numerical expressions with powers, nested parentheses, and fraction bars
independentPractice: Practice problems evaluating numerical expressions using order of operations
assessment: Exit ticket: evaluate 3 numerical expressions with different grouping structures
capReflection: Where do students most often make errors when applying order of operations, and how can you avoid them?
